expectations.text: Uses Annotated[type, ...] pattern for ALL constrained types, not custom classes
expectations.evidence: All 6 types use Annotated: PositiveInt, NonEmptyStr, Email, MoneyAmount, Percentage, HttpsUrl

expectations.text: Types are defined as reusable aliases (e.g. PositiveInt = Annotated[int, Field(gt=0)])
expectations.evidence: Lines 11, 13, 15, 22, 28, 38: all defined as module-level type aliases

expectations.text: Money type enforces exactly 2 decimal places and positive value
expectations.evidence: Line 24: Field(gt=0, decimal_places=2) on Decimal base type

expectations.text: Types are demonstrated in a model to show reuse
expectations.evidence: ProductListing model on line 43 uses all 6 constrained types
